issues.message: Flex container children are wrapping to 2 rows (3 children, container 350px wide, content 366px wide).
issues.suggestion: Consider using <Columns collapseAt="..."> for responsive multi-column layout, or <Stack> for vertical arrangement.

issues.message: Content uses only 57% of the desktop width (1280px): it stays in a narrow, mobile-shaped band instead of adapting to the available space.
issues.suggestion: Let the layout grow with the viewport using Marigold responsive primitives — <Columns collapseAt="..."> for multi-column areas, AppLayout for the shell, Stack/Inline for flow — instead of a fixed-width container. (Intentionally centred max-width reading columns are fine and may trip this; treat it as a relative signal.)

issues.message: Document should have one main landmark (landmark-one-main)
issues.suggestion: Wrap your page content in `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` to provide a `<main>` landmark. Import AppLayout from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: All page content should be contained by landmarks — 22 elements affected (region)
issues.suggestion: All page content must be inside a landmark region. Use `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` for the main area, `<TopNavigation>` for the header (`<header>`), and `<Sidebar>` for side navigation (`<aside>`). Import from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Interactive element <input> (input) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > input:nth-child(1)

issues.message: Interactive element <button> (button) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(3) > button:nth-child(2)

issues.message: Component order inconsistency: Tab moved from <button> at (1038, 651) to <button> at (17, 425).
issues.suggestion: Reorder components in JSX to match the visual layout, or use Marigold layout components (Stack, Columns) to control both visual and DOM order.

issues.message: Element <input> is hidden behind sticky or fixed content when it receives focus (WCAG 2.4.11).
issues.suggestion: Keep focused elements clear of sticky headers/footers and overlays. Add scroll-margin (or scroll-padding on the scroll container) so the element scrolls into an unobscured position when focused.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(4) > section:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > label:nth-child(1) > span:nth-child(1) > input:nth-child(1)

issues.component: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(4) > section:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > label:nth-child(1) > span:nth-child(1) > input:nth-child(1)
issues.message: Keyboard trap detected — focus cycles through 23 elements without reaching the rest of the page (WCAG 2.1.2).
issues.suggestion: Ensure focus can leave this container via Tab, or provide an Escape key handler to close it.
